extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by versus against each category: I counted only the Against Company, Against Subsidiary, Against Directors and Against Promoter rows. Against the Company, the table reports criminal Nil, 6 tax proceedings, 5 statutory/regulatory proceedings and ₹82.83 million quantified; the subsidiary and promoter/director rows report Nil, while all By rows were excluded. No contingent-liabilities table or stated Total is disclosed in the provided risk section, so no date or amount can be extracted. The concentration figures disclosed relate to supplier concentration, not company-wide customer revenue; therefore top-five and top-ten customer percentages are not available. Litigation amounts use ₹ million, and ₹82.83 million was converted to ₹8.283 crore by dividing by 10.
